# scaleway_cockpit_products (Data Source)






<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `region` (String) The region you want to attach the resource to

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `names` (List of String) List of product names for use in scaleway_cockpit_exporter.exported_products.
- `products` (List of Object) List of Cockpit products available for exported_products in scaleway_cockpit_exporter. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--products))

<a id="nestedatt--products"></a>
### Nested Schema for `products`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String)
- `family_name` (String)
- `name` (String)
